texto: If you're in a country and you want to learn about it, it's a good idea to go and found out what they have to say for themselves; you might want to write a good story about it, when they're not looking.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Marion Davies sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “If you're in a country and you want to learn about it, it's a good idea to go and found out what …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, travel, about, útil em momentos de viagem e reflexao.

frase_original: If you're in a country and you want to learn about it, it's a good idea to go and found out what they have to say for themselves; you might want to write a good story about it, when they're not looking.
